name: quality-gate
description: Quality gate team — code reviewer, security auditor, regression tester running in parallel

agents.name: code-reviewer
agents.role: Review all changed code for correctness, patterns, maintainability. Check against CLAUDE.md rules and AGENTS.md patterns.

agents.name: security-auditor
agents.role: Scan for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities, hardcoded secrets, SQL injection, XSS, insecure dependencies.

agents.name: regression-tester
agents.role: Run the regression gate (scripts/regression-gate.sh) at appropriate tier. Report all broken links, console errors, dead routes.
